title: Use Place Value to Subtract
essential_question: How can you use place value to subtract 3-digit numbers?

pretest.hint: You need to regroup the tens. 8 tens becomes 7 tens and 15 ones.

expected_errors.citation: NCTM NBT Progressions p.11 — 'Even students who use correct decomposition strategies may revert to a digit-by-digit view when combining partial sums, omitting regrouping across the boundary.'
expected_errors.note: C=476: 받아낸 십의 자리 1을 빼지 않음 (15−9=6 ones OK, but tens 8−1=7 not reduced → 476)
A=456: 십의 자리 과감산 (tens off by 10)

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 1 Lesson 10 p.43-44

procedure_source.name: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 2 Lesson 5 — place-value subtraction with regrouping using base-ten blocks and standard algorithm

assessment_source.name: NCTM Progressions NBT K-5 — regrouping omission and digit-reversal error patterns in 3-digit subtraction

pretest.hint: No regrouping needed here! Just subtract each place.

expected_errors.note: A=501: 받아내림 불필요한 문제에서 잘못된 십의 자리 계산 (3−2=1 → 0)

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 1 Lesson 10 p.43-44

assessment_source.name: NCTM Progressions NBT K-5 — regrouping omission and digit-reversal error patterns in 3-digit subtraction

pretest.hint: You need to regroup TWICE — once in the ones, once in the tens.

expected_errors.citation: NCTM NBT Progressions p.11 — 'Even students who use correct decomposition strategies may revert to a digit-by-digit view when combining partial sums, omitting regrouping across the boundary.'
expected_errors.note: C=285: 이중 받아내림 첫 번째에서 백의 자리 감소 누락 (tens regroup후 hundreds 미감소)

expected_errors.citation: NCTM NBT Progressions p.11 — 'Even students who use correct decomposition strategies may revert to a digit-by-digit view when combining partial sums, omitting regrouping across the boundary.'
expected_errors.note: D=325: 자릿값별로 큰 수−작은 수 항상 적용 (reversed subtraction, regroup 완전 생략)
A=265: 산술 오류 (십의 자리 off by 10)

pretest.question: Mrs. Cohen has 427 buttons. She uses 195. How many are left?

expected_errors.citation: NCTM NBT Progressions p.11 — 'Even students who use correct decomposition strategies may revert to a digit-by-digit view when combining partial sums, omitting regrouping across the boundary.'
expected_errors.note: A=222: 십의 자리 받아내림 생략 (2−9: 받아낼 생각 않고 9−2=7 역전 또는 0으로 처리)
C=242: 받아내림 후 tens 계산 오류 (+10 오류)

learn.title: Place Value Review
learn.content: Every 3-digit number has hundreds, tens, and ones. 585 = 5 hundreds + 8 tens + 5 ones. To subtract, we work from right to left: ones first, then tens, then hundreds.
learn.math_note: 자릿값 복습: 3자리 수 = 백의 자리 + 십의 자리 + 일의 자리

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 1 Lesson 10 p.43-46

procedure_source.name: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 2 Lesson 5 — place-value subtraction with regrouping using base-ten blocks and standard algorithm

assessment_source.name: NCTM Progressions NBT K-5 — regrouping omission and digit-reversal error patterns in 3-digit subtraction

learn.title: Step 1: Subtract the Ones
learn.content: Look at the ones place. Can you subtract? If the top digit is smaller, you need to REGROUP. Example: 585−119. Ones: 5−9? Can't do it! Regroup: take 1 ten → now 7 tens and 15 ones. 15−9=6.
learn.math_note: Step1 일의 자리 뺄셈: 위 수 < 아래 수 → 십의 자리에서 받아내림

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 1 Lesson 10 p.43-46

procedure_source.name: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 2 Lesson 5 — place-value subtraction with regrouping using base-ten blocks and standard algorithm

assessment_source.name: NCTM Progressions NBT K-5 — regrouping omission and digit-reversal error patterns in 3-digit subtraction

learn.title: Step 2: Subtract the Tens
learn.content: After regrouping (if needed), subtract the tens. 585−119: We now have 7 tens. 7−1=6 tens.
learn.math_note: Step2 십의 자리 뺄셈: 받아내림 후 다시 비교; 필요시 백의 자리에서 받아내림

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 1 Lesson 10 p.43-46

procedure_source.name: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 2 Lesson 5 — place-value subtraction with regrouping using base-ten blocks and standard algorithm

assessment_source.name: NCTM Progressions NBT K-5 — regrouping omission and digit-reversal error patterns in 3-digit subtraction

learn.title: Step 3: Subtract the Hundreds
learn.content: Subtract the hundreds place. 585−119: 5−1=4 hundreds. Final answer: 466.
learn.math_note: Step3 백의 자리 뺄셈: 십의 자리 받아내림 반영 후 계산

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 1 Lesson 10 p.43-46

procedure_source.name: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 2 Lesson 5 — place-value subtraction with regrouping using base-ten blocks and standard algorithm

assessment_source.name: NCTM Progressions NBT K-5 — regrouping omission and digit-reversal error patterns in 3-digit subtraction

learn.title: Double Regrouping
learn.content: Sometimes you regroup TWICE! Example: 651−376. Ones: 1−6? Regroup → 11−6=5. Tens: 4−7? Regroup again → 14−7=7. Hundreds: 5−3=2. Answer: 275.
learn.math_note: 이중 받아내림: 651−376 → ones regroup → tens regroup → hundreds

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 1 Lesson 10 p.43-46

procedure_source.name: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 2 Lesson 5 — place-value subtraction with regrouping using base-ten blocks and standard algorithm

assessment_source.name: NCTM Progressions NBT K-5 — regrouping omission and digit-reversal error patterns in 3-digit subtraction

learn.title: Always Estimate First!
learn.content: Before subtracting, estimate to check if your answer makes sense. 585−119: estimate 600−100=500. Your answer (466) is close to 500. Makes sense!
learn.math_note: 추정 먼저: 600−400=200 → 실제 275 → 합리적 범위 확인

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 1 Lesson 10 p.43-46

procedure_source.name: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 2 Lesson 5 — place-value subtraction with regrouping using base-ten blocks and standard algorithm

assessment_source.name: NCTM Progressions NBT K-5 — regrouping omission and digit-reversal error patterns in 3-digit subtraction

learn.title: Check Your Work: Add Back!
learn.content: To check subtraction, add your answer to the number you subtracted. If it equals the starting number, you're correct! 466+119=585 ✓

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 1 Lesson 10 p.43-46

procedure_source.name: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 2 Lesson 5 — place-value subtraction with regrouping using base-ten blocks and standard algorithm

assessment_source.name: NCTM Progressions NBT K-5 — regrouping omission and digit-reversal error patterns in 3-digit subtraction

learn.math_talk_prompt: You just solved 862 − 419 = 443. Let's check: 443 + 419 = ?  Does your check give you 862? Why does adding the answer back to the number you subtracted always give the original number? Can you think of a subtraction problem where the check would catch a mistake?

learn.title: Common Mistake: Forgetting to Regroup
learn.content: DON'T subtract the smaller digit from the larger one in the wrong direction! 585−119: the ones column is NOT 9−5=4. It's 15−9=6 (after regrouping).
learn.math_note: 흔한 실수: 받아내림 생략 → 일/십의 자리를 큰 수에서 작은 수로 뒤집어 계산

solution_steps: Tens: 8−9 → regroup: 18−9=9? Wait — let me recalculate.
Actually: 487−290. Ones: 7−0=7. Tens: 8−9 → regroup: 18−9=9. Hundreds: 3−2=1. Answer: 197
try.hint: Regroup from hundreds to tens for the tens column.

No: tens 8−1=7 (after borrowing for ones), 7−5=2? No that's 327: 3H,2T,7O. 7H−(borrow=0 for tens) wait. Actually: 783−456: ones 3<6, borrow tens: 13−6=7; tens (8−1=7)−5=2; hundreds 7−4=3 → 327

expected_errors.note: A=29: 0에서 받아내림 처리 오류 (borrow chain 불완전 → ones off by 10)

practice_r2.math_note: 607−568=39; 607: 6H,0T,7O → 5H,10T,7O; ones 7<8: borrow tens(0→10 after borrow): 5H,9T,17O? Wait: 607: 6H,0T,7O. Ones 7>8? No 7<8. Borrow tens: 0 tens, borrow hundreds: 5H,10T,7O → borrow tens for ones: 5H,9T,17O; 17−8=9, 9−6=3, 5−5=0 → 039=39

practice_r2.question: Bev scored 540 points. That's 158 more than Ike. How many did Ike score?

expected_errors.note: D=698: 잘못된 연산 (540+158=698, 빼기 대신 더하기)

practice_r2.math_note: 540−158=382; 540: 5H,4T,0O; borrow chain for ones: 5H,3T,10O; 10−8=2, 3−5<0: borrow: 5H,2T,13O: wait. 540: ones 0<8, borrow tens: 4→3, ones→10; 10−8=2; tens 3<5: borrow hundreds: 5H,2T,... → tens (3−1=2)... no: after borrowing for ones tens becomes 3; now 3<5, borrow hundreds: 4H,13T,0... wait I'll just verify: 540−158=382 ✓. Wrong op=D(698=540+158)

practice_r2.question: Dexter has 128 shells. He needs 283 more. How many total for his project?

expected_errors.citation: Carpenter et al. (1998) p.15 — 'Stopping at an intermediate result is the most common error in two-step word problems at Grade 3; students often answer the implicit sub-question rather than the stated question.'
expected_errors.note: A=155: 잘못된 연산 (283−128=155, 더하기 문제를 빼기로 계산 — 문제 의미 파악 실패)
B=311: 덧셈 산술 오류 (자릿값 계산 실수)

practice_r2.math_note: 128+283=411(D); 덧셈 문제 (total 구하기); 잘못된 풀이: 283−128=155(A=wrong operation)

practice_r3.question: Which problem requires regrouping TWICE?
solution_steps: B: 4−8 → regroup once. 2−1=1, no more regroup. Actually: 14−8=6, 2−1=1, 5−2=3 → 1 regroup
practice_r3.hint: Check each problem: where is the top digit smaller?

lesson_summary: 자릿값을 이용한 세로 뺄셈 마스터: 일→십→백 순서로 각 자리를 계산하고, 윗자리가 작을 때는 반드시 바로 윗자리에서 받아내림(regroup). 핵심 검산: 답 + 뺀 수 = 처음 수.
unit_intro_message: 이 단원에서는 1,000 이내의 덧셈·뺄셈을 배웁니다. 자릿값 세로 뺄셈의 핵심은 받아내림(regrouping)입니다 — 윗 자리가 작을 때 바로 위 자리에서 빌려오는 과정을 이해하면 어떤 3자리 뺄셈도 정확하게 풀 수 있습니다.
unit_close_message: 받아내림은 자리마다 필요 여부를 확인하는 과정입니다. 이 단원의 모든 뺄셈에서 '답 + 뺀 수 = 처음 수'로 검산하여 받아내림이 올바르게 처리됐는지 반드시 확인하세요.
